name: Shanib Khan
title: Aspiring Data Analyst
tagline: Turning Raw Data into Real Decisions

about.bio: I'm a Data Analyst enthusiast pursuing B.Sc. (Hons) Computer Science at Delhi University. With hands-on experience in Python, SQL, Power BI, and Excel, I've built real-world analytics projects covering EDA, dashboard development, and database design.
about.bio2: Certified by Tata and Deloitte virtual analytics programs, I love finding hidden patterns in data and converting them into impactful, decision-ready insights. Currently seeking a data analytics internship to apply and grow my skills in a real-world environment.

experience.title: Tata Data Analytics Virtual Experience
experience.description: Completed an industry-grade virtual analytics program simulating real business data challenges. Worked on data cleaning, analysis, and visualization tasks reflecting actual Tata project workflows.

experience.title: Deloitte Data Analytics Virtual Experience
experience.description: Participated in Deloitte's analytics simulation covering business intelligence, data storytelling, and dashboarding. Gained exposure to consulting-style data problem solving.

experience.title: B.Sc. (Hons) Computer Science
experience.description: Pursuing core subjects including DBMS, Computer Networks, Probability Theory, Operating Systems, and Mathematics & Statistics. First year CGPA: 7.0. Actively building projects alongside academics.

projects.title: Retail Store Transaction Deep Insight
projects.description: Analyzed retail transaction data using Python to uncover revenue trends. Built an interactive Power BI dashboard with 5+ KPIs including monthly sales trend, category breakdown, and customer retention rate.

projects.title: Sales Performance & Forecast Dashboard
projects.description: End-to-end sales analytics on 792 transactions. Designed sales funnel to identify conversion drop-offs and implemented Linear Regression forecasting to predict next 2 quarters revenue.

projects.title: Voting System Database Application
projects.description: Designed and developed a database-driven voting system with full CRUD functionality and normalized relational schema managing voter registration, candidates, and election results.

projects.title: Expense Splitter
projects.description: A Python application to split group expenses fairly among participants. Handles multiple scenarios, unequal splits, and generates a clear settlement summary for each member.

projects.title: Propose Day Funny Webpage
projects.description: A fun and interactive web page designed for Propose Day with playful animations, witty responses, and a quirky UI that keeps the user engaged with humorous click interactions.

projects.title: Eidi Special Webpage
projects.description: A festive themed webpage crafted for Eid celebrations. Features animated greetings, personalized Eidi messages, and a warm festive UI with custom animations and interactive elements.

projects.title: Data Generator Tool
projects.description: A Python utility to generate realistic synthetic datasets for testing and demonstration. Supports custom schemas, data types, and volume. Useful for prototyping analytics pipelines.

projects.title: Guess the Number Game
projects.description: A Python number guessing game with difficulty modes, score tracking, and a hint system. Built to practice control flow, functions, and user input handling.

projects.title: Customer Churn Analysis Dashboard
projects.description: Exploratory data analysis on telecom customer churn data. Identifies key churn predictors, visualizes behavioral patterns, and delivers a Power BI dashboard for stakeholder reporting.

projects.title: HR Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Analysis of employee performance, attrition trends, and department-wise metrics. Interactive visualizations to help HR teams make data-backed workforce decisions.

projects.title: Sales Price Predictor
projects.description: Machine learning model predicting product prices based on historical sales data and features. Uses regression algorithms with cross-validation and feature engineering pipelines.

projects.title: COVID-19 Data Explorer
projects.description: Interactive data exploration tool analyzing global COVID-19 trends. Visualizes case trajectories, recovery rates, and vaccination progress across countries using public datasets.
